sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28105" key="doru/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δορύδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δόρυ,</foreign> <sense id="n28105.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaft</tr_> of a hook or probe, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl>(?)ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:47:17:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.17.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
